title: Elon Musk Just Shocked OpenAI With Grok 5
summary: A video essay argues that Grok 5, a 1.5 trillion-parameter model reportedly trained on developer workflow data, represents Elon Musk's major push into AI coding against OpenAI and Claude. The piece frames concurrent advances by DeepSeek and Alibaba Qwen3.7-Max as evidence that the AI race is shifting from chatbots toward autonomous agents for coding, debugging, and research tasks.
